item.title: When you reject that something is
item.description:
When you reject that something is
political, you don”t fail to make it politicalM but you just silence any contention that people could have with

item.title: shoutout crackheadbarneyandfriends for chasing him down and getting him to expose as clearly as possible how bad he is that actu...
item.description:
shoutout crackheadbarneyandfriends for chasing him down and getting him to expose as clearly as possible how bad he is that actually defending this position #greenscreenvideo

item.title: Find community and organisation because just as the labourers and unionists who were attacked in 1886 , we are stronger together...
item.description:
Find community and organisation because just as the labourers and unionists who were attacked in 1886 , we are stronger together and they win if we are divided: whether that is across national divides, or ones built into us from bigotry.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: We hear a lot about the poverty draft, but if you listen to what people are saying that does not represent the major majority of...
item.description:
We hear a lot about the poverty draft, but if you listen to what people are saying that does not represent the major majority of those targeted - primarily because education is necessary, and we have such a unequal education that even the military is not a good social ladder if you are at the very bottom#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Retrenching beauty standards is not good - tho let me be clear, as long as women are expected to do this you obviously have an o...
item.description:
Retrenching beauty standards is not good - tho let me be clear, as long as women are expected to do this you obviously have an obligation to not fail on your implicit reciprocal duty
